case_title: IVY WANG VS. NICOLE R. COLLET

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-22-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT COLLET, NICOLE R.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-20-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-20-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. VICKIE YEUNG INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY WANG, IVY COLLET, NICOLE R.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WANG, IVY AS TO DEFENDANT COLLET, NICOLE R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WANG, IVY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLLET, NICOLE R. $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,575.00, THE COURT FINDS THE DAMAGES REASONABLY ATTRIBUTABLE TO THE ACCIDENT EXCEED THE JURISDICTIONAL LIMIT OF THIS COURT AND THAT PLAINTIFF WAS NOT AT FAULT FOR THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
